name: carta-plugins
description: Official Carta plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: carta-cap-table
plugins.description: Carta Cap Table plugin — skills and hooks for querying cap tables, grants, SAFEs, 409A valuations, waterfall scenarios, and more

plugins.name: carta-investors
plugins.description: Carta Investors plugin — skills for querying investors data, performance benchmarks, regulatory reporting, and more via the Carta MCP server

plugins.name: carta-crm
plugins.description: Add investors, companies, contacts, deals, and notes to the Carta CRM via the public API

plugins.name: carta-onboarding
plugins.description: Corporation onboarding tools — unified cap table onboarding orchestrator (entity setup, document extraction, OBS import, pro forma, reconciliation with global/regional rules, 33-point and 55-point validation), document upload and extraction via CLI, AI-assisted extraction review, and Shareworks migration for Implementation Managers
